caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a dark t-shirt and white headphones, appears in a small video overlay on the left side of a video game menu. He is positioned in front of a window and a decorated Christmas tree. The game interface features a dark purple theme with a top bar displaying the text "HEAD 2 HEAD" and various numeric statistics. Four large rectangular tabs are visible at the top: a bright lime green "PLAYOFFS" tab, "CHAMPIONS", "SQUADS SEASON", and "ALL-MADDEN SEASONS". Below these, a results screen lists game outcomes, including text such as "Losses Until Elimination 1" and "Wins to Super Bowl 2". As the scene progresses, the man's facial expressions shift from a wide-eyed, surprised look with his mouth open to a joyful smile, showing his teeth. The background elements and the on-screen game menu remain static across the sequence.
